Preconditions: Given I am on the site

Preconditions:
Given I am on the site
And I navigate to the journey landing page
Steps (text): When I log in as an ineligible user

Preconditions:

And I am not logged in

When I arrive on the Landing Page
And I click to Register
Expected: Then I will be taken to the relevant registration page to begin creating an account

Steps (text):
When I have completed my registration

Expected: Then I am passed back to the site to begin the membership journey

Case: Journey tab display - standard user paying for self
Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in standard user
And I am paying for myself
Steps (text): When I begin the membership journey
Expected: Then I will see the expected journey steps in the correct order (e.g. Check details, Billing details, Payment, Order complete)

Case: Journey tab display - standard user not paying for self
Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in standard user
And I am not paying for myself
Steps (text): When I begin the membership journey
Expected: Then I will see the expected journey steps in the correct order (e.g. Check details, Billing details, Order complete)

Case: Journey tab display - secondary user type paying for self
Preconditions:
Given I am logged in as a secondary user type
And I am paying for myself
Steps (text): When I begin the membership journey
Expected: Then I will see the expected journey steps appropriate for this user type

Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in user
And my account already holds the relevant details (name, address, etc.)
Steps (text): When I land on the personal details step for the first time
Expected: Then I will see my information prefilled in the form fields

Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in user
And my account holds no relevant information
Steps (text): When I land on the personal details step for the first time
Expected: Then I will see all fields are empty

Case: No pre-set details - populate required fields
Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in user
And my account holds no information
Steps (text):
When I fill all required fields
And I move to the next step
Expected: Then my details will be saved

Case: Pre-set details - update values in fields
Preconditions:
Given I am a logged in user
And my account holds pre-populated information
Steps (text):
When I update the values in some fields
And I move to the next step
Expected: Then my updated details will be saved

Preconditions: Given I am any user completing the personal details step
Steps (text): When I attempt to interact with the 'Save and continue' button
Expected: Then I can only progress once all required fields are filled with valid values

Preconditions: Given I am in the membership journey

Given I am a user

Steps (text): When I click the Decline button

Case: Land on billing - paying for self
Preconditions:
Given I am a user
And I am paying for my own membership
Steps (text): When I arrive at the billing step
Expected:
Then I will see a collection of payment options

Then I will see a message confirming payment is covered

Given I am on the billing step
